tasks.label: Launch trade-manager full suite
tasks.command: Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList @('-NoExit','-Command','Set-Location ''C:\sraman\stem\trading''; $env:PYTHONPATH = ''src''; .\.venv\Scripts\uvicorn.exe trade_manager.api:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5004 --reload'); Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList @('-NoExit','-Command','Set-Location ''C:\sraman\stem\trading\ui''; npm run dev'); Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList @('-NoExit','-Command','Set-Location ''C:\sraman\stem\trading''; .\appPayTmBroker_venv.bat')
